name: vonage
install_notice:
1. Configura le proprietà vonage.* in config/application.properties (application-name, application-id, api-key, api-secret, base-url, private-key, voice-answer-url, voice-event-url, rtc-event-url, from-number).
2. Installa la dipendenza frontend: npm install @vonage/client-sdk (nella cartella gui/).
3. Configura le webhook URL nel Vonage Dashboard: https://your-domain.com/api/vonage/answer e https://your-domain.com/api/vonage/event.
4. Copia la chiave privata Vonage in /app/config/private.key.
5. Installa ngrok nel container per esporre gli endpoint locali durante lo sviluppo:
   curl -sSL https://ngrok-agent.s3.amazonaws.com/ngrok.asc | tee /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/ngrok.asc >/dev/null && echo 'deb https://ngrok-agent.s3.amazonaws.com bookworm main' | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ngrok.list && apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y ngrok
6. Aggiungi NGROK_TOKEN=<il-tuo-token> nel file .env (token disponibile su https://dashboard.ngrok.com), poi registra il token e avvia il tunnel:
   ngrok config add-authtoken $NGROK_TOKEN
   ngrok http 8080
   Usa l'URL pubblico generato come base per voice-answer-url, voice-event-url e rtc-event-url.
